CodeNearby 2.0

## CodeNearby 2.0

Launching today

Tinder for developers! Find coding partners & build together [...] 📌

Hey Product Hunt! 👋 We're back, \\CodeNearby\\ is relaunching with a fresh UI and a bunch of new features. If you tried us before, this isn't the same app. If you haven't, now's the time. You won't be disappointed. \\What's new & what it does:\\ - 🎨 Rebuilt UI, cleaner, faster, way less clunky - 🔍 Search devs by skill, interest, location - 🤖 AI-Connect, describe who you need in plain English, get matched via GitHub - 💬 Real-time chat to actually talk to them - 📢 Developer feed for sharing updates/snippets - 🎭 Virtual gatherings, polls, events, discussions - 🐙 GitHub-synced profiles, zero manual setup It's fully \\open-source\\, self-host it, contribute, or just poke around: github.com/subh05sus/codenearby Go have a look and find your dev partner. Feedback, bugs, roasts, all welcome. 🙏 [...] CodeNearby is open-source social network built for developers. Find coding partners by skill, interest, or location, chat real-time, share updates, host virtual meetups, and use AI-Connect to discover collaborators through natural conversation. GitHub-powered profiles, global reach, local focus.

Free

## Products used by CodeNearby

### Explore the tech stack and tools that power CodeNearby. See what products CodeNearby uses for development, design, marketing, analytics, and more.

Design & Creative 1 [...] Design & Creative 1

Aceternity UI

Aceternity UIMake your websites look 10 times better

5.0 (18 reviews)

Interface design tools

•

Design resources

•

UI frameworks

Aceternity UI provides aesthetic, well-structured, and customizable UI components that immediately elevate the look of any website. Compared to alternatives, it focuses on modern, elegant, and animated components that fit seamlessly into React, Next.js, and Framer Motion workflows—making it perfect for devs who want visually appealing UIs without spending hours on styling.

Engineering & Development 1

Next.js

Next.jsCreate web applications with the power of React components

5.0 (486 reviews)

Engineering & Development

•

Static site generators

•

UI frameworks [...] •

Static site generators

•

UI frameworks

Next.js is the go-to choice over alternatives like CRA or Nuxt because of its server-side rendering (SSR), static site generation (SSG), and API routes—all natively integrated with React. Its performance optimizations (Image & Font Optimization, Middleware, Edge Functions) and deep Vercel integration make it unbeatable for modern web applications that need speed and scalability.

WordFlippin

used Next.js to build WordFlippin

•3 reviews [...] used Next.js to build WriteRush 2.0

•15 reviews

Next.js is the backbone of the entire WriteRush backend. It's the rare tool that truly delivers on the promise of a full-stack framework. I was able to build the marketing landing page and the entire secure backend API for payments and user auth all within a single, cohesive codebase. Next.js gave me, a solo developer, the leverage to build what would have once required a whole team.

used Next.js to build CodeNearby

•2 reviews [...] Revv Invest

used Next.js to build Revv Invest

•3 reviews

We're able to make our UX maximally snappy by leveraging the fine-grained performance controls that Next.js enables: supporting both server-side and client-side rendering, fetching content/views only as needed via dynamic imports, minimizing HTTP hops by utilizing getServerSideProps, and making reloads near-instant with the help of caching.

#### What's great

fast performance (46)server-side rendering (25)
